name: Time Finance Company
description_short: Time Finance offers small emergency loans from $100–$1,050 with fast phone-based approval and easy monthly payments in Memphis, Tennessee.
description_long:
Time Finance is a small-dollar lender based in Memphis, Tennessee, operating from a single physical location at 1924 Madison Ave. The company has been serving borrowers seeking immediate cash for unexpected expenses through a straightforward phone application process. Their service model emphasizes accessibility and speed, positioning themselves as a solution for consumers facing short-term financial gaps.

Time Finance specializes in small emergency loans ranging from $100 to $1,050, structured with easy monthly installment payments rather than single lump-sum repayment. The company advertises fast approvals and accepts applications entirely by phone (901-729-2727), eliminating the need for in-person visits or complex online applications. They also promote a referral incentive program offering $100 for customer referrals.

The company distinguishes itself primarily through accessibility claims—advertising "fast approvals" and stating they "accept all applications," suggesting a lenient underwriting approach compared to traditional banks. Operating as a local, single-location lender also differentiates them from larger online emergency lenders, though this geographic limitation restricts their service area.

Time Finance operates in the high-risk lending space where APRs and fees are not disclosed on their website, a critical transparency gap. Without published terms, borrowers cannot evaluate true cost before calling. The company's catchphrase of accepting "all applications" suggests likely high interest rates typical of small-dollar lenders. Limited online presence and single-location operation raise questions about regulatory oversight and modern consumer protections.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Loan amounts up to $1,050 cover genuine emergency expenses beyond payday loan minimums
Monthly installment structure allows repayment flexibility versus lump-sum payday loans
Phone-based application eliminates need for office visits or complex online portals
Fast approval claims reduce wait time for urgent cash needs
Local brick-and-mortar presence in Memphis provides accountability touchpoint
$100 referral bonus incentivizes word-of-mouth marketing and customer acquisition
No minimum credit score mentioned—marketing suggests approval accessibility
cons: No APR, fees, or pricing terms disclosed on website—impossible to assess true cost before applying
Single Memphis location severely limits geographic accessibility for most consumers
Minimal online presence and outdated website design raise questions about regulatory compliance and consumer data security
No third-party reviews, ratings, or independent verification of claim to accept "all applications"
Vague terms like "easy monthly payments" lack specificity on actual payment schedules or default consequences
best_for: Memphis-area residents with unexpected emergency expenses under $1,050
Borrowers seeking phone-based application convenience over online or in-person processes
Consumers with poor credit seeking lenders with lenient approval standards
Short-term borrowers preferring monthly installments over single lump-sum repayment structures
diagnosis: Time Finance is best suited for Memphis-area residents experiencing genuine emergencies who prioritize speed and accessibility over competitive pricing transparency. The critical caveat is that the complete absence of APR and fee disclosure makes cost comparison impossible—borrowers must call to learn actual interest rates, which are statistically likely to be high given the small-dollar, likely subprime lending model.
services: Same-day or next-day funding (implied by 'fast approval' language)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
